Issue Description: Chat input has no accessible label
Expected Behavior: Input must have label or aria-label
Minimum 10px for labels; 12px for readable text
Actual Behavior: 7px age labels; 8–9px across multiple label classes

Issue Description: aria-expanded missing on all collapsible controls
Actual Behavior: No aria-expanded on CollapsibleSection / ChatCard / Demographics toggles

Issue Description: Sidebar nav uses title not aria-label
Actual Behavior: title attribute used — not reliably read by screen readers

Issue Description: height: 100vh causes iOS Safari layout issues
Actual Behavior: height: 100vh on sidebar and main container

Issue Description: Shell background uses hardcoded hex not a design token
Actual Behavior: background: #d5dae6 (wrong color not in token system)

Issue Description: Placeholder SVG shown instead of actual brand logo
Expected Behavior: Use logo-white.png on dark sidebar background
Actual Behavior: Generic 3-layer stack SVG used as logo mark

Expected Behavior: Display user's actual name or role from AppContext
Actual Behavior: Hardcoded string regardless of logged-in user

Issue Description: Chat message area capped at 80px on desktop
Expected Behavior: At least 140px to show conversation context
Cards should not overlap left panel at any breakpoint
Actual Behavior: At 1024px viewport total required width exceeds available space by ~66px

Issue Description: 2-card flex row instead of 3-column grid per spec
Expected Behavior: 3-column grid with repeat(3 1fr) and align-items: end
Actual Behavior: Flex row with 2 cards; no third placeholder slot

Issue Description: Magic number 2.5rem in panel top position
Expected Behavior: Use a named CSS custom property for breadcrumb height offset

Issue Description: No loading state for map GeoJSON
Expected Behavior: Show skeleton or spinner while topo JSON loads
Actual Behavior: Blank/partial map visible while GeoJSON loads on slow connections

Expected Behavior: Add type=button to all non-submit buttons

Issue Description: Chat suggestion pills not recoverable after first message
Expected Behavior: Allow suggestions to reappear or persist as a toggle

Issue Description: Demographics Details/Collapse label ambiguous and missing aria-expanded
StatusBar component defined but never used
Actual Behavior: StatusBar function defined but not referenced anywhere

Issue Description: Mobile tab bar code permanently hidden — dead code
Actual Behavior: MOBILE_NAV / mobileBar / mobileBtn all permanently display:none
